start.text: Good morning, Uncle Lim! Big day today, huh? How are you feeling?
start.speaker: player

options.response: Aiyo, nervous lah! But excited also. Last night I couldn't sleep, keep thinking, finally, finally. Thirty-seven months on that dialysis chair... now maybe, last time already.

counted.text: When you sit in that chair three times a week, you count. Gives you something to look forward to, you know? And now here we are.
counted.speaker: character

fidget.text: He chuckles softly, but you can see his fingers fidgeting with the edge of his hospital blanket.
fidget.speaker: empty

hold_hand.text: You reach over and gently grasp his hand without saying a word.
hold_hand.speaker: empty

routine.text: Uncle, I'm going to run through a few things with you before the team comes, okay? Just routine.
routine.speaker: player

options.response: You think I dare to eat? I want this surgery to go well!

any_pain.text: Any new pain anywhere? Chest, back, stomach?
any_pain.speaker: player

wristband.text: Alright. I'm going to check your wristband and run your vitals one more time.
wristband.speaker: player

scan_wristband.text: You scan his wristband and move methodically through the checklist.
scan_wristband.speaker: empty

rub_hands.text: You rub them briefly between yours before attaching the pulse oximeter, a small instinct more than a procedure.
rub_hands.speaker: empty

all_set.text: All looking good, Uncle. You're all set.
all_set.speaker: player

beat_of_quiet.text: There's a beat of quiet. He doesn't let go of your hand right away.
beat_of_quiet.speaker: empty

wistful.text: He stares off out of the window, eyes look wistful, carrying the quiet weight of someone who has long since made peace with something that still hurts.
wistful.speaker: empty

head_up.text: If anything happens in there... you'll make sure my son knows I wasn't scared, right? Tell him his father went in with his head up.
head_up.speaker: character

throat_tightens.text: Your throat tightens. You keep your face steady.
throat_tightens.speaker: empty

options.text: Uncle, nothing is going to happen. You're going to be just fine.
I'll tell him. But you're going to be able to tell him yourself.

nods_once.text: He nods once, slowly, and releases your hand.
nods_once.speaker: empty

options.response: Okay. Go do your work. Don't waste time on this old man.

never_waste.text: You are never a waste of time, Uncle Lim. See you later, okay?
never_waste.speaker: player

doorway_wave.text: You smile at him one last time from the doorway. He waves you off with a small, brave hand.
doorway_wave.speaker: empty
